Screen.title: Checkout
Screen.subtitle: Complete your booking for a trial lesson with {tutorName}
Screen.pendingPaymentNotice: You already have a pending payment with this tutor. Please complete payment below.
Screen.bookedLockedNotice: You already booked this tutor and cannot create another booking.

missingInfo.title: Missing booking information
missingInfo.description: Open this page from the trial lesson booking flow on a tutor card.
missingInfo.expectedQuery: Expected query: tutorId, startAt, durationMinutes, dayOfWeek

errors.loadTutor: Could not load tutor profile. Please try again later.
errors.missingRate: This tutor has no hourly rate; checkout cannot continue.

toast.alreadyBookedDescription: You already have a booking with this tutor and cannot create another one.
toast.popupBlockedDescription: Please allow popups and try again.
toast.paypalUnavailableDescription: PayPal is not configured yet. Please choose VNPAY.

success.title: Payment successful
success.description: Thank you. Your trial lesson booking payment went through. You will receive a confirmation shortly.

user_cancelled.title: Booking was cancelled
user_cancelled.description: This booking was not paid, so the system automatically cancelled it to avoid keeping an unpaid reservation.

nextSteps.noCharge: No money was charged for this cancelled booking.
nextSteps.retry: You can create a new booking and pay again at any time.
nextSteps.mistake: This cancellation does not affect your account history or other bookings.

payment_declined.title: Your bank declined the payment
payment_declined.description: The card issuer or payment method declined this charge (for example insufficient funds or policy limits). Your booking stays unconfirmed.

nextSteps.noCharge: If the charge did not go through, you owe nothing for this checkout attempt.
nextSteps.retry: Try another card, bank account, or method from the tutor’s checkout page.
nextSteps.mistake: Contact your bank if you believe this was a mistake, then try again.

auth_failed.title: Authentication did not succeed
auth_failed.description: The bank needs you to approve this payment (OTP, password, etc.) and it was not completed.

nextSteps.noCharge: Incomplete authentication usually means nothing was deducted.
nextSteps.retry: Start checkout again and complete every step from your bank or VNPAY.
nextSteps.mistake: If you did not receive an OTP, check SMS limits or try another registered device.

session_expired.title: This payment session timed out
session_expired.description: You took too long on the payment page, so the session expired for security.

nextSteps.noCharge: Expired sessions are not completed charges.
nextSteps.retry: Open checkout from the tutor card again to start a fresh payment session.
nextSteps.mistake: Use a stable connection and complete the flow without long pauses.

gateway_error.title: Payment could not be completed
gateway_error.description: Something went wrong with the payment gateway or your bank. This booking is not confirmed.

nextSteps.noCharge: If the deduction did not succeed, nothing is owed for this checkout attempt.
nextSteps.retry: Try again from the tutor’s checkout page, or use another card or payment method.
nextSteps.mistake: If money was taken but the page still shows an error, keep the bank’s reference and contact support or your bank.

invalid_signature.title: We could not verify this return
invalid_signature.description: The payment return could not be validated. For your safety we are not showing a success state.

nextSteps.noCharge: No booking is confirmed from this return until you try again from checkout.
nextSteps.retry: Start a new payment from the tutor’s card. If it keeps happening, contact support.
nextSteps.mistake: Avoid bookmarking or sharing raw payment URLs; always use the in-app checkout button.

order_not_found.title: We could not match this payment to a booking
order_not_found.description: The reference from the payment provider did not match an open checkout in our system.

nextSteps.noCharge: If you never completed checkout, nothing is owed on our side.
nextSteps.retry: Create the trial lesson booking again from the tutor’s profile.
nextSteps.mistake: If money left your account, save the transaction reference from your bank and contact support immediately.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.description: The payment did not finish successfully. Your trial lesson booking is not confirmed.

nextSteps.noCharge: If your bank shows no debit, retry checkout from the tutor page.
nextSteps.retry: Try another payment method or wait a moment and retry.
nextSteps.mistake: If you are unsure whether you were charged, check your balance and contact support with the receipt.

successDetail.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
successDetail.notFound: This booking could not be found or you do not have access.
successDetail.unauthorizedTitle: Sign in to view this page
successDetail.unauthorizedDescription: Log in with the same account you used to book this trial lesson.
successDetail.headline: You’re all set
successDetail.subheadline: Your trial lesson is confirmed on our side. Here’s everything in one place.
successDetail.pendingPaymentHint: Payment is still processing — this usually updates within a minute after your bank confirms.

tips.checkEmail: Check your email and in-app notifications for messages from the tutor or platform.
tips.dm: Open a chat with your tutor in the app to align on materials, link, or platform <brand>MEZON</brand>.
tips.early: Join 3–5 minutes early to test camera and microphone.
tips.policy: If you need to cancel or reschedule, do it as early as possible and follow the tutor’s policy.
tips.support: Keep your booking reference handy when contacting support.
